Operation 'QueryAllProductsByVersion' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is wordy and uses 'Query to obtain' which is passive. Description is too brief and lacks details about response structure, data fields returned, and use cases. Added clarity about return type (array of Product objects), specific fields included, and practical context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Query to obtain inventory data for all products across all inventory locations
data.current_description: Get all products from all available locations.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve inventory data for all products across all locations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current inventory data for all products across all available inventory locations. Returns an array of Product objects containing GTIN/Product ID, location identifiers (GLN/Location ID), available unit quantities, and inventory assessment timestamps. Useful for obtaining a complete inventory snapshot across the entire distribution network.
data.reasoning: Original summary is wordy and uses 'Query to obtain' which is passive. Description is too brief and lacks details about response structure, data fields returned, and use cases. Added clarity about return type (array of Product objects), specific fields included, and practical context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'QueryProductsbyLocation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, inconsistent_terminology. Summary uses passive 'Query to obtain' phrasing. Description has typos ('locaiton', 'Locaiton') and lacks clarity about parameter requirements and response structure. Improved by: fixing terminology, clarifying that only one identifier is needed, specifying return fields, and using consistent domain terminology (GLN, GTIN, Product ID) from API context.

data.current_summary: Query to obtain inventory data on all products from a specific location
data.current_description: Get inventory data on all Products in a specific inventory locaiton identified with either a GLN or a Locaiton ID. The GLN / Location ID should be a valid identifier. If no matching products are found, then the response would have an empty array.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve inventory data for all products at a specific location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves inventory data for all products held at a specific inventory location, identified by either a Global Location Number (GLN) or Location ID. Accepts one location identifier parameter. Returns an array of Product objects containing product identifiers (GTIN/Product ID), available unit quantities, and inventory assessment timestamps for that location. Returns an empty array if no products are found at the specified location.
data.reasoning: Summary uses passive 'Query to obtain' phrasing. Description has typos ('locaiton', 'Locaiton') and lacks clarity about parameter requirements and response structure. Improved by: fixing terminology, clarifying that only one identifier is needed, specifying return fields, and using consistent domain terminology (GLN, GTIN, Product ID) from API context.

message: Operation 'QueryProductByLocations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, inconsistent_terminology. Summary uses passive 'Query' phrasing. Description has typo ('identifer') and lacks specificity about response structure and fields. Improved by: using active voice, clarifying parameter requirements, specifying return fields (location identifiers, quantities, timestamps), and ensuring consistent domain terminology (GTIN vs GLN distinction, Product ID) aligned with API schema definitions.

data.current_summary: Query inventory data for a specific product across all available locations
data.current_description: Search for inventory data for a specific product across multiple locations using a GTIN or Product ID. The GTIN or Product ID should be a valid identifer. If no matching products are found, then the response would have an empty array.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve inventory data for a specific product across all locations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves inventory data for a specific product across all available inventory locations, identified by either a Global Location Number (GTIN) or Product ID. Accepts one product identifier parameter. Returns an array of Product objects containing location identifiers (GLN/Location ID), available unit quantities, and inventory assessment timestamps for each location where the product is held. Returns an empty array if the product is not found in any location.
data.reasoning: Summary uses passive 'Query' phrasing. Description has typo ('identifer') and lacks specificity about response structure and fields. Improved by: using active voice, clarifying parameter requirements, specifying return fields (location identifiers, quantities, timestamps), and ensuring consistent domain terminology (GTIN vs GLN distinction, Product ID) aligned with API schema definitions.
